name: Database schema & local migrations
description: Design the initial D1 schema and migration workflow for users, households, memberships, expenses, groups, budgets, sessions, and audit records, including local seed support for development and tests. Note: the shipped baseline still contains a legacy household-scoped `expense_categories` table; after the global static category-catalog decision, that table is no longer the target product model and must be treated as implementation debt.
evidence: Replaced legacy apps/worker D1 baseline with household-finance schema; worker tests passed (47/47), local Wrangler migrate + seed succeeded, and ./init.sh passed on 2026-04-22. Historical note: this baseline models `expense_categories` as household-scoped, which no longer matches the current product truth after the later global static category-catalog decision.
